strategy.name: Volume Profile POC Bias + VAH/VAL Fakeout Absorption

volume_profile.notes: Draw and monitor POC trajectory, prior VAH/VAL, and today's developing VAH/VAL on the 5m chart.

session_volume_profile.name: Session Volume Profile
session_volume_profile.notes: User confirmed these SVP inputs as preferred settings on 2026-06-10.

bullish: Weekly bias is bullish when last week's POC is higher than the POC from two weeks ago.
Daily bias is bullish when yesterday's POC is higher than the POC from two days ago.
bearish: Weekly bias is bearish when last week's POC is lower than the POC from two weeks ago.
Daily bias is bearish when yesterday's POC is lower than the POC from two days ago.
neutral: If weekly POC direction or daily POC direction is unclear, avoid forcing a directional bias.
If fakeout and absorption bubble confirmation are missing, no entry signal is active.

long.name: Trend-aligned long
conditions: Weekly bias is bullish.
Daily bias is bullish.
Price fakeouts current developing VAL, previous day's VAL, two days ago VAL, previous week's VAL, or two weeks ago VAL, and a red absorption bubble appears.

long.name: Counter-week short-term long
conditions: Weekly bias is bearish.
Daily bias is bullish.
Price fakeouts today's developing VAL and a red absorption bubble appears.
Treat this as a short-term intraday long, not a full weekly trend trade.

long.name: Swing extreme long
conditions: Weekly and daily bias were previously misaligned, then daily POC direction turns bullish and aligns with weekly bullish bias.
Previous day's VAL, two days ago VAL, previous week's VAL, or two weeks ago VAL are involved in the fakeout area.
A red absorption bubble appears at the VAL fakeout.

short.name: Trend-aligned short
conditions: Weekly bias is bearish.
Daily bias is bearish.
Price fakeouts current developing VAH, previous day's VAH, two days ago VAH, previous week's VAH, or two weeks ago VAH, and a green absorption bubble appears.

short.name: Counter-week short-term short
conditions: Weekly bias is bullish.
Daily bias is bearish.
Price fakeouts today's developing VAH and a green absorption bubble appears.
Treat this as a short-term intraday short, not a full weekly trend trade.

short.name: Swing extreme short
conditions: Weekly and daily bias were previously misaligned, then daily POC direction turns bearish and aligns with weekly bearish bias.
Previous day's VAH, two days ago VAH, previous week's VAH, or two weeks ago VAH are involved in the fakeout area.
A green absorption bubble appears at the VAH fakeout.

risk_rules: Stop loss and take profit rules are intentionally left undefined for this version.
This version focuses on bias, key levels, fakeout behavior, and absorption confirmation.
notes: Day trading strategy on the 5m chart. Use prior weekly and daily Volume Profile POC movement to define directional bias. Use today's developing VAH/VAL for counter-week short-term alerts, but treat Developing Current VAH/VAL as lower-confidence before 17:00 Brisbane and higher-confidence after the European session opens at 17:00 Brisbane. Use prior day/week VAH/VAL fakeouts plus absorption bubbles for trend and swing entries. PW means previous week. PD means previous day. 2D means two days ago. 2W means two weeks ago.
